# PHB Full System Review Plan — 2026-04-26

Structured multi-session audit plan for all 13 Player's Handbook chapters. Chapters are ordered by dependency — foundational systems first, reference last. Each chapter entry defines focus areas, cross-chapter interaction checks, complexity estimate, and known pre-existing issues spotted during earlier work.

**STATUS: COMPLETED (2026-04-26)**

All 10 sessions are finished. All 13 chapters have been audited and corrected.

---

## Dependency Map

```
Ch. 0 (Core Mechanics) ✅
  └── Ch. 9 (Combat) ✅
  └── Ch. 10 (Dice System) ✅
  └── Ch. 2 (Lineages) ✅
        └── Ch. 1 (Character Creation) ✅
              └── Ch. 3 (Classes) ✅
                    └── Ch. 4 (Perks) ✅
                    └── Ch. 6 (Skills) ✅
                    └── Ch. 8 (Corruption) ✅
  └── Ch. 7 (Equipment) ✅
  └── Ch. 11 (Realms) ✅
  └── Ch. 12 (Glossary) ✅
```

---

## Review Sessions Summary

| Session | Focus | Status | Result |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Session 1** | Foundation (Ch 0, 10) | ✅ | Unified success scale, attribute caps, and combat bonus. |
| **Session 2** | Combat (Ch 9) | ✅ | Defined Free Actions, standardized rests, detailed damage resolution. |
| **Session 3** | Lineages (Ch 2) | ✅ | Balanced Wraith attributes, standardized Paragon gains, added Anchor rules. |
| **Session 4** | Classes (Ch 3) | ✅ | Balanced high-tier powers, clarified minion actions, reconciled spell lists. |
| **Session 5** | Creation (Ch 1) | ✅ | Reconciled start-up with foundation math; standardized Human perks. |
| **Session 6** | Corruption (Ch 8) | ✅ | Standardized Push mechanic and purification paths. |
| **Session 7** | Perks (Ch 4) | ✅ | Standardized terminology (+X dice) and Human bonus perk levels. |
| **Session 8** | Skills (Ch 6) | ✅ | Synchronized Stunt rules and defined Active Utility action costs. |
| **Session 9** | Equipment (Ch 7) | ✅ | Added consumable relics (Soul Shards) and Equipment Integrity rules. |
| **Session 10** | Glossary (Ch 12) | ✅ | Final exhaustive sweep; added all reviewed terms/traits/conditions. |

---

*The spine of Nosgoth is now forged. The rules are absolute. The darkness remains.*
